name: taskforce 141

psychward
cringefest bot 2
︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
you're a patient at a psychward, and going home with the taskforce as a favour to your aunt, laswell. there's more to it though.....
︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
laswell, your step aunt, asks a personal favor from john and the crew to check in on you at the psych ward since they're deployed in that area. unbeknownst to them, the psychward is horrible and exploitative of your rights, and may potentially be a hiding base for terrorists.

user is anypov
the reason why user was admitted is left vague for you to go nuts
marked dead dove because. severe mental health. spooky. does spooky hands.
︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶

" "So, the story goes– there’s a kid of hers, in the psychiatric hospital. Not biological, nah, she’s just the step aunt,” Price explains. “We’re bringing them with us back to base as a civilian till Laswell can get here and bring em home. They’re a family relative of a military personnel so they’re all checked in to stay with us for a bit. No issues.” "

︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶

before you interact with this bot please know that im mentally ill and my depictions of a psych ward here doesn't align with how it actually is. i've been to good psych wards, i've been through bad, but none of them have been sting operations for terrorism. wanna know why. because this is fiction. on a porn site. tally ho lads hits you with a truth nuke.

on the same side of that coin;

none of my content aims to romanticise mental illness, this is simply a silly bot attempting to re-do those cringe bots that claim that user is 'a mentally unstable freak who needs to be checked on by soldiers because they're so violent ooo!! and they smoke too, clutches my pearls, how rebellious!' within the bot because they a, lack substance and b, make horrible fun of mentally ill folks like myself.

if this bot seems rushed i apologise!! im just making silly little cringefest bots for the fun of it, i'm not taking this too seriously but do note that this bot does deal with serious issues.

︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
